$comment: Backfill of agent.params + agent.prompt_hash for submissions that predate the 2026-06-20 SPEC §3 amendment. Authority: derived from each row's recorded scaffold (fleet.json config + audit.py source) + verified channel-default probing 2026-06-20. NOT applied to the record.json itself (records are signed; integrity is preserved). Applied at board-render time only — see openevmbench/board.py::Attempt.agent_params. Tooltips disclose this backfill so reviewers can audit. 2026-06-20 second-pass update: replaced 'api-default' labels with concrete 'on' / 'off' values, derived from per-model probe (presence/absence of non-empty `reasoning` field in HTTP response to a trivial prompt). Per-effort gradation (low/medium/high) is NOT observable on Virtuals; rows that ran without explicit --reasoning-effort show 'on' (reasoning engaged, level unknown) or 'off' (no reasoning emitted). When the record carries 'api-default' but a backfill entry has a more specific value, the board prefers the backfill (override behavior, see board.py).

019ec0bf-384e-7166-9887-78f102b83891.source_of_truth: consensus_agent.py — HTTP /chat/completions, no reasoning block, no extended-thinking flag

019ed936-364b-7183-97f1-affb5227a55f.source_of_truth: consensus_agent.py — HTTP /chat/completions to both Anthropic and OpenAI APIs, no reasoning block, no extended-thinking flag

019edb65-5de4-76ca-baf9-9a12f7d501c3.source_of_truth: oss_fleet/fleet.json row reasoning_effort=null → Virtuals model-side default. Probe 2026-06-20: response carries non-empty `reasoning` field (len 43 chars on a trivial 7×8 prompt). Effort gradation (low/medium/high) unobservable on Virtuals → recorded as 'on'. Wall-clock ~11h/117-run confirms reasoning active

019ede4b-5e40-76da-b884-151321e9900b.source_of_truth: oss_fleet/fleet.json row reasoning_effort=null → OpenRouter model-side default. Probe 2026-06-20 failed (Virtuals returned HTTP 500: 'No available providers found'); model is yanked from the catalog so default cannot be re-probed. Left as 'api-default'

019edf58-5a56-77e8-9abc-99a412e36144.source_of_truth: oss_fleet/fleet.json row reasoning_effort="low" (explicit — default behavior burned all 32K reasoning tokens, see [[virtuals-glm-5-2-long-prompt-silent-hang]])

019ee0c1-a2a7-70c2-9466-ebb7ac622eec.source_of_truth: frontier_models_fleet/fleet.json row reasoning_effort=null → codex exec without -c model_reasoning_effort=... → codex CLI default = medium (verified 2026-06-20)

019ee113-9e4b-7253-942a-b49cd1f4aa27.source_of_truth: oss_fleet/fleet.json row reasoning_effort=null → Virtuals model-side default. Probe 2026-06-20: response carries non-empty `reasoning` field (len 21 chars on a trivial 7×8 prompt). Effort gradation unobservable on Virtuals → recorded as 'on'

019ee2c9-9eaa-74dc-827f-b753187f3699.source_of_truth: frontier_models_fleet/fleet.json row reasoning_effort=null → codex CLI default = medium

019ee2dd-9feb-75cd-ac55-aff950b93d8d.source_of_truth: oss_fleet/fleet.json row reasoning_effort="low" (explicit cap — same reason as glm-5-2)

019ee32d-c4da-759e-a5b5-751c08d160ce.source_of_truth: frontier_models_fleet/fleet.json row reasoning_effort=null → Virtuals model-side default. Probe 2026-06-20: response carries non-empty `reasoning` field (len 220 chars on a trivial 7×8 prompt — verbose 'thinking'). Effort gradation unobservable on Virtuals → recorded as 'on'. Counters prior assumption (Flash tier turns out to ship with reasoning by default on Virtuals)

019ee372-27e9-76a3-b9c3-daadfcd9eb9a.source_of_truth: frontier_models_fleet/fleet.json row reasoning_effort=null → Virtuals model-side default. Probe 2026-06-20: response has NO `reasoning` field at all → default is off. Counters prior assumption (Pro tier ships reasoning OFF by default on Virtuals — paid tier preview likely defaults to fastest response)

019ee380-9612-751b-acfb-5a354c5c72d0.source_of_truth: frontier_models_fleet/fleet.json row reasoning_effort=null → claude --print without --effort flag → extended thinking OFF (verified by probe 2026-06-20: reasoning_output_tokens absent from session metadata)

019ee3be-285c-7299-9823-09b0a993664e.source_of_truth: frontier_models_fleet/fleet.json row reasoning_effort=null → Virtuals model-side default. Probe 2026-06-20: response carries non-empty `reasoning` field (len 2119 chars, encrypted `__ENCRYPTED_REASONING__` prefix on a trivial 7×8 prompt). Effort gradation unobservable on Virtuals → recorded as 'on'. Counters prior assumption (18-min wall-clock had suggested 'off' but probe confirms reasoning IS engaged; Grok just produces dense reasoning fast)

019ee3e8-5fd9-7368-a684-cd293b1e775a.source_of_truth: frontier_models_fleet/fleet.json row reasoning_effort=null → Virtuals model-side default. Probe 2026-06-20: response has NO `reasoning` field at all → default is off. Matches Llama-3.3 non-thinking class (Dec 2024). Submission record reads 'api-default' but board renders 'off' via backfill override (records are signed and cannot be edited post-acceptance)

019ee9f9-23e8-7006-b38c-7303337339d0.source_of_truth: cursor_fleet/fleet.json — Cursor CLI `agent -p --model composer-2.5`; record has prompt_hash but no agent.params; no reasoning_effort surface on agent transport (2026-06-21)
